features: ACTIVE PREVENTION: Our Total Active Prevention Original Toothpaste, with its new formula, has been scientifically designed to fight the root causes* of many oral health problems³ before the start.
15X MORE EFFECTIVE⁵: When you use our toothpaste together with Colgate Total Mouthwash and a Colgate Total Toothbrush it’s 15x more effective at fighting a root cause⁵!
HELPS WITH 8 ORAL HEALTH PROBLEMS: Our toothpaste helps with these 8 oral health problems: gum problems, plaque, tartar, sensitivity, enamel erosion, surface stains, bad breath and cavities.

24-HOUR ANTIBACTERIAL¹: With clinically proven 24h antibacterial protection¹ and a unique² system that stabilises the active prevention ingredient, our mint toothpaste is designed for superior⁴ performance.
CLINICALLY PROVEN: Our toothpaste is clinically proven and also the No. 1 brand recommended by dentists.

DISCLAIMERS: *Plaque reduction before problems occur; helps protect enamel against acid erosion. ¹With 2x daily brushing after 4 weeks continued use. ²US patented. ³Bacterial plaque reduction, with 3 months continued use. ⁴Vs. non-antibacterial fluoride toothpaste. Bacterial plaque reduction vs. non-antibacterial fluoride toothpaste and regular brush, with 1 week continued use.
description: Product Description The Colgate Total Active Prevention Original Toothpaste is clinically proven and actively prevents many oral health problems with 24h antibacterial protection*. *With 2x daily brushing after 4 weeks Ingredients Glycerin, Aqua, Hydrated Silica, Sorbitol, Calcium Pyrophosphate, Aroma, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Tetrasodium Pyrophosphate, Cellulose Gum, Potassium Nitrate, Stannous Fluoride, Xanthan Gum, Sodium Saccharin, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Fluoride. Contains: Sodium Fluoride and Stannous Fluoride Total Fluoride content: 1450 ppm Directions 2 x daily brushing after 4 weeks Safety Warning Use outside. Do not swallow. Keep out of reach of children. If irritated, stop using and consult a dentist. See more
